'''tasate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:multigenerically|multigenerically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-s-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:multigenerically|multigenerically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| tasate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:tasate|tasate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tasatesher|tasatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tasatesherĂ«m|tasatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tasatero|tasatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tasateshĂ«|tasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tasateshĂ«m|tasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitasatero|gokitasatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitasateshĂ«|gokitasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitasateshĂ«m|gokitasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotasankerom|gotasankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotasankeshĂ«|gotasankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotasankeshĂ«m|gotasankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotasankeya|gotasankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tasaterom|tasaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tasatemu|tasatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tasateya|tasateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitasaterom|gokitasaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitasatemu|gokitasatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitasateya|gokitasateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:tasasate|tasasate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tasasatesher|tasasatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tasasatesherĂ«m|tasasatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tasasatero|tasasatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tasasateshĂ«|tasasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tasasateshĂ«m|tasasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitasasatero|gokitasasatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitasasateshĂ«|gokitasasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitasasateshĂ«m|gokitasasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotasasankerom|gotasasankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotasasankeshĂ«|gotasasankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotasasankeshĂ«m|gotasasankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotasasankeya|gotasasankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tasasaterom|tasasaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tasasatemu|tasasatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tasasateya|tasasateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitasasaterom|gokitasasaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitasasatemu|gokitasasatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitasasateya|gokitasasateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:tĂŠsĂŠte|tĂŠsĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tĂŠsĂŠtesher|tĂŠsĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠsĂŠtesherĂ«m|tĂŠsĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tĂŠsĂŠtero|tĂŠsĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«|tĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m|tĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitĂŠsĂŠtero|gokitĂŠsĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«|gokitĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m|gokitĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotĂŠsĂŠnkerom|gotĂŠsĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«|gotĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gotĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotĂŠsĂŠnkeya|gotĂŠsĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tĂŠsĂŠterom|tĂŠsĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠsĂŠtemu|tĂŠsĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tĂŠsĂŠteya|tĂŠsĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitĂŠsĂŠterom|gokitĂŠsĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitĂŠsĂŠtemu|gokitĂŠsĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitĂŠsĂŠteya|gokitĂŠsĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:tafsafte|tafsafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tafsaftesher|tafsaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafsaftesherĂ«m|tafsaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tafsaftero|tafsaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tafsafteshĂ«|tafsafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafsafteshĂ«m|tafsafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitafsaftero|gokitafsaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitafsafteshĂ«|gokitafsafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitafsafteshĂ«m|gokitafsafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotafsafnkerom|gotafsafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotafsafnkeshĂ«|gotafsafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotafsafnkeshĂ«m|gotafsafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotafsafnkeya|gotafsafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tafsafterom|tafsafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafsaftemu|tafsaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tafsafteya|tafsafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitafsafterom|gokitafsafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitafsaftemu|gokitafsaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitafsafteya|gokitafsafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
